LanguageData.VPE_Neurophagy_Neuralink_ChooseAmount_ST: Choose Amount Of Charges To Use: {0}/{1}
LanguageData.VPE_Neurophage_Neuralink_NoNeurophagySta: {0} has no Neurophagy levels to spend.
LanguageData.VPE_Neurophage_NeuralString_TargetTooHig: {0}'s Psylink level is superior to {1}'s Psylink level.
LanguageData.VPE_Neurophage_NeuralString_NeurophagySt: {0} doesn't have enough Neurophagy levels to control {1}.
LanguageData.VPE_Neurophage_EmergencyTransference_Paw: /!\ {0} has died, {1} may select a Neuro-Drone to possess. /!\
LanguageData.VPE_Neurophage_EmergencyTransference_Hea: Select a Neuro-Drone to transfer into:
LanguageData.VPE_Neurophagy_NeurophagyGoodwillDrop_ST: Using Neurophagy or Apex Neurophagy on live creatures will lower goodwill with their faction by {0} goodwill.
LanguageData.VPE_Neurophage_TransferenceLethargyStage: Lethargy: coma stage duration: {0} ticks (60 = 1 sec, 2500 = 1 hour, 60000 = 1 day)
Lethargy: reduced motor skills stage duration: {0} ticks (60 = 1 sec, 2500 = 1 hour, 60000 = 1 day)
